source_files: game.html line 1323 (keys map), line 1609 (mouse_held), line 2244 (keydown handler)
notes: Mouse sensitivity 0.0035 rad/px — typical FPS feel; tune in playtest.
Key codes use KeyboardEvent.code so layout-independent (WASD on QWERTY = ZQSD on AZERTY by physical position).
Sprint + jump declared even though hero-input-move doesn't consume them yet — they're the well-known shape so downstream facets can read tuning without churn.
